chat_history.gcorex: A car is a complex and versatile wheeled vehicle primarily designed for land transportation. It consists of essential components like an engine, transmission system, brakes, steering mechanism, suspension, and tires. The internal combustion engine powers most cars, converting fuel into mechanical energy to drive the wheels. Cars can be categorized based on their design, functionality, and number of passengers they carry. For instance, sedans are four-door passenger vehicles with a trunk, while SUVs (Sport Utility Vehicles) are larger vehicles offering more space and ground clearance. Electric cars have gained popularity as eco-friendly alternatives to traditional internal combustion engine vehicles, using rechargeable batteries instead of fossil fuels. In addition, self-driving or autonomous cars are an emerging technology that promises to revolutionize the automotive industry by reducing human error
